name: Weapons Training
briefing: Welcome to Weapons Training. Practice targeting, beam fire, torpedo management, and shield balance against training drones. The helm will manoeuvre automatically.

objectives.text: Select a target — click on a contact on your radar
objectives.hint: Your radar shows enemy contacts as red triangles. Click one to lock onto it. The selected target appears highlighted and its distance/bearing shows in the status panel.

objectives.text: Fire your beam weapon at the target
objectives.hint: Press the FIRE BEAMS button (or keyboard shortcut). Beams have a firing arc — the target must be within your arc. Watch the beam cooldown bar before firing again.

objectives.text: Adjust shield balance — boost forward shields to 80%
objectives.hint: Use the shield balance sliders. Set FRONT to 80 and REAR to 20. Forward shields protect you when charging; rear shields protect during retreat. The ship's shields will regenerate over time.
Keep firing beams at the drones. Beams drain shields before hitting hull. When shields are down, hull damage accumulates. Prioritise the closer drone first. Remember to lead moving targets slightly.
